name: open-science-skills
description: Claude Code skills for experimental social science methodology

plugins.name: open-science-skills
plugins.description: 16 skills for experimental social science: conjoint design / cleaning / diagnostics, survey design, list experiments, cross-national design, topic modeling, LLM text classification, VLM-OCR + post-OCR cleanup, hypothesis building, narrative building, pre-registration writing, methods reporting, paper-review-lite (in-session adversarial audit), and presubmit (activator for the standalone API-driven peer-review pipeline). All skills auto-trigger from context and are available as /skill-name slash commands.
